caption: A person with fair skin, wearing a white wristband, is seen from a top-down perspective working on a handmade birthday card. The scene is set on a white gridded cutting mat with various crafting supplies nearby, including a blue tape runner and floral patterned paper. In the initial frames, the person's hands carefully position a small white square tag onto the front of a brown and floral card. The tag features the printed text, "Wishing your BIRTHDAY is filled with all the best things". As the sequence progresses, the person presses the tag firmly into place on the card. A small logo that reads "Stampin' Up!" is visible in the bottom left corner of the frame. The action is focused and repetitive, showing the final stages of assembling the card's decorative front.
